_comment_intent: Project-level allowlist for Claude Code subagents. Per Claude Code issues #18950 + #28584, subagents do NOT inherit user-level permissions starting v2.1.56; every tool call prompts unless this project's settings.json explicitly allows it. This allowlist is intentionally TIGHT: read operations are broad, but file-mutating + filesystem-destructive operations are scoped or excluded. Subagents never need to rm/mv/cp/chmod outside what cargo + git handle internally.
_comment_scope: All Write/Edit are path-scoped to the wat-rs tree. Bash destructive commands (rm/mv/cp/chmod/rmdir/mkdir) are EXCLUDED — orchestrator (main session) handles those if needed. Subagents that think they need rm should be doing 'mktemp + cleanup-on-exit' instead. cargo + git are broad because they manage their own state safely.
